hero.title: Lingmo OS
hero.subtitle: Elegant. Fast. Open.
hero.description: Built for everyone. Designed for the future.

features.title: Why Lingmo OS?
features.description: Discover what makes Lingmo OS the perfect choice for your daily computing needs.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Fast boot times and responsive performance even on older hardware. Lingmo OS is optimized to make the most of your system resources, ensuring smooth multitasking and a snappy user experience.

security.title: Security
security.description: Built on a rock-solid Linux foundation with regular security updates, mandatory access controls, and encrypted storage. Your data stays safe with Lingmo OS.

developer.title: Developer Friendly
developer.description: Comprehensive development tools and environment support out of the box. From compilers to containers, Lingmo OS provides everything you need to build, test, and deploy software.

design.title: Beautiful Design
design.description: A modern, intuitive user interface that is both aesthetically pleasing and highly functional. Lingmo OS brings you a cohesive visual experience across the entire desktop.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Fully open source under GPL v3.0. Every line of code is transparent, auditable, and free to use, modify, and share. The community drives the direction of the project.

communityDriven.title: Community Driven
communityDriven.description: Built by the community, for the community. Your contributions, feedback, and ideas shape the future of Lingmo OS every day.

download.pageDescription: Get the latest version of Lingmo OS. Choose from stable, beta, or nightly builds.
download.dialogSubtitle: Choose the edition and architecture before downloading.
download.downloadHint: You may safely close this dialog.

about.pageDescription: Learn about the history, mission, and vision behind Lingmo OS.

documentation.pageDescription: Comprehensive guides, tutorials, and references for Lingmo OS.

community.pageDescription: Join the Lingmo OS community and connect with other users and developers.

gallery.pageDescription: Browse screenshots and media showcasing Lingmo OS.

donate.pageDescription: Support the Lingmo OS project with a donation.
donate.transparency: We are committed to transparency. All donations are tracked and reported publicly.

sponsors.pageDescription: Meet the organizations and individuals that support Lingmo OS.

faq.pageDescription: Find answers to common questions about Lingmo OS.

privacy.pageDescription: How Lingmo OS handles your data and privacy.

license.pageDescription: Lingmo OS is released under the GNU General Public License v3.0.

footer.description: A modern, elegant, and open-source operating system built for everyone.
footer.builtWith: Built with passion by the Lingmo community

blog.pageDescription: Latest news, updates, and articles from the Lingmo OS team.

releases.pageDescription: View all Lingmo OS releases with version history and changelogs.
